files.notes: This file contains three distinct sections: the main Notes from Field article by Amy Brown Lyman, followed by the Guide Lessons for September (which includes multiple lesson topics), and finally a brief Teacher's Topic section. The Guide Lessons section is quite extensive and covers multiple lesson topics but appears to be one cohesive unit based on the formatting and structure.
